brief_title: Trastuzumab Deruxtecan in HER2-Positive Metastatic Breast Cancer After Prior Trastuzumab
official_title: A Phase 3, Randomized, Open-Label Study of Trastuzumab Deruxtecan (T-DXd) Versus Treatment of Physician's Choice in Patients with HER2-Positive Unresectable or Metastatic Breast Cancer Previously Treated with Trastuzumab-Based Therapy
interventions: Trastuzumab deruxtecan 5.4 mg/kg IV every 3 weeks
Treatment of physician's choice (capecitabine + lapatinib, or trastuzumab + capecitabine)
brief_summary: This Phase 3 study evaluates the efficacy and safety of trastuzumab deruxtecan versus physician's choice therapy in patients with HER2-positive metastatic breast cancer who have received prior trastuzumab-based treatment. The co-primary endpoints are progression-free survival and overall survival.
raw_inclusion_text:
1. Women or men aged 18 years or older

2. Histologically confirmed HER2-positive (IHC 3+ or ISH-amplified) breast cancer

3. Unresectable or metastatic disease

4. Prior treatment with trastuzumab and a taxane in any setting

5. At least one and no more than three prior lines of anti-HER2 therapy in the metastatic setting

6. ECOG Performance Status 0 or 1

7. At least one measurable lesion per RECIST v1.1

8. Left ventricular ejection fraction (LVEF) >= 50% by echocardiogram or MUGA

9. Adequate organ and bone marrow function

10. Known hormone receptor status

11. Willingness to use adequate contraception

12. Written informed consent
raw_exclusion_text:
1. Prior treatment with trastuzumab deruxtecan or any antibody-drug conjugate containing a topoisomerase I inhibitor

2. History of interstitial lung disease or pneumonitis

3. Clinically significant cardiac disease within past 6 months

4. Uncontrolled brain metastases (treated and stable brain metastases allowed)

5. Active autoimmune disease requiring systemic treatment

6. Concurrent treatment with other anticancer therapy

7. Known HIV, active HBV or HCV infection

8. Pregnant or breastfeeding

inclusion_criteria.text: Women or men aged 18 years or older
Histologically confirmed HER2-positive (IHC 3+ or ISH-amplified) breast cancer
Prior treatment with trastuzumab and a taxane in any setting
At least one and no more than three prior lines of anti-HER2 therapy in the metastatic setting
At least one measurable lesion per RECIST v1.1
Left ventricular ejection fraction (LVEF) >= 50% by echocardiogram or MUGA
Adequate organ and bone marrow function

exclusion_criteria.text: Prior treatment with trastuzumab deruxtecan or any antibody-drug conjugate containing a topoisomerase I inhibitor
History of interstitial lung disease or pneumonitis
Clinically significant cardiac disease within past 6 months
Uncontrolled brain metastases (treated and stable brain metastases allowed)
Active autoimmune disease requiring systemic treatment
Concurrent treatment with other anticancer therapy
Known HIV, active HBV or HCV infection
